## 3dslibris 2.5.0

Performance, stability, and new formatting support.

### New

- **Text alignment support**: `text-align: center` and `text-align: right` are now honoured in EPUB reflow. Each paragraph emits an alignment token that `Page::Draw` uses to compute per-line offset, so wrapped lines stay correctly aligned across the whole paragraph. See [#47](https://github.com/RigleGit/3dslibris/issues/47).
- **README revamped**: the README has been reorganized to better highlight the features of the project.

### Performance

- **EPUB CSS scanning**: only the `<head>` section of each XHTML spine document is scanned for stylesheet links, reducing zip I/O on large books.
- **Reused zip handle**: a single `unzFile` handle is recycled across all spine CSS scans instead of opening/closing per document.
- **Plain text pagination**: eliminated per-line heap allocation; uses data/size pointer streaming.
- **Text shaping pipeline**: reuses static scratch buffers (`text_run`, `normalized`, `breaks`) instead of re-allocating on every shaped run.
- **Release build overhead removed**: guarded `osGetTime` calls and unnecessary allocations with `DSLIBRIS_DEBUG` only.

### Fixes

- **PDF shouldn't crash on HOME button**: `ParseMuPdfFile` is now split into three independently cancellable steps (`fz_open_document`, `fz_count_pages`, `fz_load_outline`), each separated by an APT yield point via `open_cancel_poll::Poll`. Pressing HOME during PDF loading is now handled cleanly instead of causing a console restart. See [#58](https://github.com/RigleGit/3dslibris/issues/58).
- **Worker join timeouts bounded**: `LightEvent_Wait` in `CancelMuPdfIncrementalRenderState` replaced with a 100 ms polling loop; `ShutdownMuPdfWorker` and `ShutdownCbzWorker` now use a 500 ms join timeout instead of `U64_MAX`, preventing either path from blocking HOME acknowledgment indefinitely. See [#58](https://github.com/RigleGit/3dslibris/issues/58).
- **Bookmarks button icon updated**: refreshed the bookmarks button artwork. See [#60](https://github.com/RigleGit/3dslibris/issues/60).
- **Large EPUB page limit raised**: `kMaxPagesInMemory` raised from 5 000 → 25 000 and cache guard to 50 000, fixing books that stopped loading halfway through. See [#54](https://github.com/RigleGit/3dslibris/issues/54) and [#37](https://github.com/RigleGit/3dslibris/issues/37).
- **HR overflow tracking**: parser and renderer now agree on `pen.y` after `<hr>` rules, preventing `<hr/> <p>Text</p>` from overlapping text. See [#37](https://github.com/RigleGit/3dslibris/issues/37).
- **PagedListMenu overflow**: pagination indices changed from `u8` to `u16` so menus with more than 255 entries no longer wrap and corrupt the page list.
- **MOBI synchronous-only open**: removed the deferred-finalize path that could leave the reader in an inconsistent state on large MOBI files.
- **Startup font path cleanup**: removed hardcoded RomFS font paths; all runtime asset discovery now goes through `paths::kRomfsFontDir`.
- **Reflow open gate simplified**: removed stale `ForceSynchronousBookOpen` flag and `deferred_pumped` references; `ShouldUseAsyncReflowOpen` is now a single-parameter function.

---

## ❤️ Community Shoutouts

3dslibris wouldn't be the same without your support! This version is dedicated to:

* **Text alignment**: Thanks to @EmbersFlying for opening [#47](https://github.com/RigleGit/3dslibris/issues/47) and pushing for `text-align: center` and `text-align: right` support in EPUB reflow.
* **Large book reports**: Thanks to @Davetheword and @EmbersFlying for reporting [#54](https://github.com/RigleGit/3dslibris/issues/54) and [#37](https://github.com/RigleGit/3dslibris/issues/37): those issues led to raising the page limit to 25.000 and fixing the `<hr>` overflow overlap bug.
* **Bug triaging**: Thanks to @runarcn, @EmbersFlying, and @TrevorArenival07 for testing and reporting multiple issues that were fixed (or at least tried) in this release.
* **Fueling the Code:** A special thank you to my **Ko-fi supporters**. Your donations help keep the project going and keep me caffeinated!

*Want to support the project? Consider leaving a ⭐ on GitHub or [buying me a coffee](https://ko-fi.com/rigle)!*

### Included assets

- `3dslibris.cia`
- `3dslibris-debug.cia`
- `3dslibris.3dsx`
- `3dslibris-debug.3dsx`
- `3dslibris-sdmc.zip`
- `3dslibris-source.tar.gz`
